help.default: Confidence status for the character's whereabouts.
help.known: The location is established as a working fact of the current story.
help.likely: This is a likely location, but it is not firmly confirmed.
help.rumored: This is a rumor or an unverified lead.
help.present: The character is in the current scene.

situation.label: Situation
situation.help: A brief, neutral description of what the character sees or hears and should react to.

gmCorrection.label: GM correction
gmCorrection.help: Why the previous character response was sent back for revision.

location.label: Where
location.help: The character's position or location relative to the current scene.

activity.label: Activity
activity.help: What the character is visibly doing right now.

attitude.label: Attitude
attitude.help: The character's visible attitude in this scene.

reason.label: Why
reason.help: Why the GM is changing world state or calling the tool.

source.label: Source
source.help: Where the location information came from.

inScene.label: In scene
inScene.help: Named characters present in the new scene.

exits.label: Exits
exits.help: Visible paths the player can take from the current scene.

items.label: Items
items.help: Visible scene objects that can potentially be interacted with.

constraints.label: Constraints
constraints.help: Physical or situational constraints of the scene.

tension.label: Tension
tension.help: The current pressure level of the scene.

purpose.label: Purpose
purpose.help: Which uncertain outcome the roll checks.

help.default: Internal GM tool. Details are available in the raw JSON below.
help.ask_npc: Asks a specific character what they say or do.
help.move_npc: Updates a character's presence in the current scene.
help.set_npc_presence: Updates a character's presence in the current scene.
help.set_npc_whereabouts: Stores where an absent character can be found.
help.set_scene: Replaces the current scene when the player reaches a new place.
help.roll_dice: Makes a D&D 5e roll for an action with an uncertain outcome.
help.get_world_fact: Checks established facts and information in world memory.
help.ask_player: Offers the player quick action options.
help.query_world_state: Searches world memory within the requested visibility scope.
help.update_world_state: Stores facts, rumors, NPC memories, relationships, and goals.
help.update_character: Updates selected fields of the player or an NPC.
help.get_npc_profile: Requests selected fields from an NPC profile.
help.tool_search: Loads a hidden tool by keyword.
help.draft_world_bible: Creates or updates a structured world draft.
help.edit_world_bible: Edits selected world fields and sections.

npcPresence.title: Scene presence —
npcPresence.presentHelp: The character was added to the current scene.
npcPresence.absentHelp: The character was removed from the current scene.
npcPresence.visibleHelp: The player and scene can see the character.
npcPresence.hiddenHelp: The character is present implicitly or outside the player's view.
npcPresence.hearsHelp: The character can hear the current scene.
npcPresence.deafHelp: The character cannot hear the scene and should not react to its conversation.

whereabouts.title: Whereabouts —
whereabouts.placeHelp: Where the character can be sought based on current information.

setScene.title: Scene change
setScene.titleHelp: Title of the new current scene.
setScene.blockedHelp: Why this exit cannot currently be used freely.
setScene.itemFixed: not portable as an ordinary item
setScene.constraintHelp: A physical, social, or situational rule the GM must account for.

rollDice.title: Dice roll
rollDice.kindHelp: The roll type selected before the result.
rollDice.targetHelp: The target number was fixed before the roll.

getWorldFact.title: World memory request
getWorldFact.queryHelp: A world-memory query: the GM should verify facts rather than invent them.

askPlayer.title: Player options
askPlayer.questionHelp: The prompt shown above quick-response buttons.

queryWorldState.title: Search world memory
queryWorldState.scopeHelp: The visibility scope searched by the GM.

advanceTime.title: Advance time
advanceTime.minutesHelp: How many in-world minutes passed this turn.

getNpcProfile.title: Character profile —
getNpcProfile.presetHelp: The profile field group requested by the GM.

toolSearch.title: GM tool search
toolSearch.queryHelp: The GM's request to load a hidden tool.

draftBible.title: World draft
draftBible.titleHelp: The world's title in this draft.

help.get_world_fact: What world memory returned for the GM's query.
help.query_world_state: What the GM's world-memory search found.
help.update_world_state: The result of writing to world memory.
help.get_npc_profile: NPC profile fields returned by the request.
help.advance_time: The new world-clock state after advancing time.
help.update_character: Which player or NPC fields changed.
help.tool_search: Which hidden tools the GM loaded.

errors.load: debug data could not be loaded

rolls.nextHint: The next roll will use this die value, then the override will reset.
rolls.allHint: Every roll will use this die value until the override is disabled.

facts.deleteNote: The fact will be removed from world memory.

stateRecords.hint: Durable world memory. It reaches the model through query_world_state within the selected scope and does not change the cached prefix.
stateRecords.kindNote: What is stored: a fact, rumor, NPC memory, relationship, or goal.
stateRecords.scopeNote: Who can access this record during memory search.
stateRecords.deleteNote: The record will no longer be included in model memory.

rumors.hint: Reaches the GM through query_world_state as unconfirmed information and does not change the cached prefix.
rumors.deleteNote: The rumor will disappear from available world information.

storyEditor.title: Story title
storyEditor.cacheWarning: The intro is part of the cached prefix. Saving rebuilds it once; the other fields do not affect the cache.
storyEditor.hiddenTruth: Hidden truth (secret; not part of the prefix)

sceneEditor.title: Scene title
sceneEditor.itemsHelp: Array of objects: id, name, location, visible, portable, owner, details.
sceneEditor.exitsHelp: Array of objects: id, name, destination, visible, blocked_by.

npcEditor.secretWarning: Changing the secret is risky: old NPC memory may conflict with the new profile. Reset NPC memory manually if needed.
npcEditor.resetMemory: Reset NPC memory (history, compact, thread) — irreversible
npcEditor.resetWarning: This NPC's personal history will be deleted and a new thread created. This character's cache and memory will be reset.

runtime.cacheHelp: The cached prefix consists of system rules and the public intro. Other edits are appended to the tail and do not invalidate the prefix.
runtime.cachedTokensHelp: cached_tokens greater than zero means the prefix was reused.
runtime.modelSettingsHelp: Read only. Settings are changed in the header and apply from the next turn.

panel.tip: View and edit the story's internal state.
panel.heading: story debug
panel.notOpened: the panel has not been opened yet
panel.objectiveHelp: A developer note that is not sent directly to the model.
panel.briefHelp: This text appears in the chat's top card and does not affect the GM cached prefix.
panel.publicIntroHelp: Part of the cached prefix. Editing it rebuilds the prefix once.
panel.hiddenTruthHelp: Not part of the prefix. Reaches the GM through query_world_state with scope=gm.
